get.description: List notification preferences for the authenticated user.

post.description: Save notification preferences for the authenticated user.

get.description: List notifications for the authenticated user.

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

put.description: Mark the specified notifications as read.
Mark the specified notification as read.
Disconnect my connection from a third-party platform.

parameters.description: The registration ID of the third-party platform.
parameters.name: registerId

get.description: List posts owned by the current user with pagination, sorting, keyword, publish phase, and category filters.

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Filter posts by publish phase. Supported values follow PostPhase, such as DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, PUBLISHED, or FAILED.
parameters.name: publishPhase

parameters.description: Keyword used to match post title, slug, or excerpt.
parameters.name: keyword

parameters.description: Category metadata name used to include posts in that category and its child categories.
parameters.name: categoryWithChildren

post.description: Create a draft post for the current user. To create it with initial content, put JSON-serialized Content into metadata.annotations['content.halo.run/content-json'].

requestBody.description: Post extension to create. The server assigns spec.owner from the current user and consumes the content-json annotation as initial content when present.

get.description: Get a post owned by the current user by metadata name.

parameters.description: Metadata name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

put.description: Update post metadata and editable spec fields for the current user. Content is not updated by this operation.

parameters.description: Metadata name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

requestBody.description: Post extension with updated metadata/spec values. The server preserves owner, publish, snapshot, and deleted state fields, and ignores the content-json annotation here.

get.description: Get the editable draft snapshot of a post owned by the current user.

parameters.description: Metadata name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Whether to return the head snapshot patched against the base snapshot. Defaults to false.
parameters.name: patched

put.description: Update the editable draft snapshot of a post owned by the current user. The snapshot must belong to the post and must be the current head snapshot.

parameters.description: Metadata name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

requestBody.description: Snapshot payload carrying JSON-serialized Content in metadata.annotations['content.halo.run/content-json'].

put.description: Publish a post owned by the current user from its current head snapshot.

parameters.description: Metadata name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

delete.description: Move a post owned by the current user to the recycle bin.

parameters.description: Metadata name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

put.description: Unpublish a post owned by the current user so it is no longer served as published content.

parameters.description: Metadata name of a post owned by the current user.
parameters.name: name

get.description: Get a content snapshot for a post owned by the current user. The snapshot must belong to the post specified by postName.

parameters.description: Metadata name of the snapshot to fetch.
parameters.name: name

parameters.description: Metadata name of the post that owns the snapshot. The post must belong to the current user.
parameters.name: postName

parameters.description: Whether to return the snapshot patched against the post base snapshot. Defaults to false.
parameters.name: patched

get.description: List available AnnotationSettings for the given targetRef. The available AnnotationSettings are determined by the currently activated theme and started plugins.

parameters.description: The targetRef of the AnnotationSetting. e.g.: 'content.halo.run/Post
parameters.name: targetRef

put.description: Create or update my preference by group.

get.description: Get TOTP auth link, including secret
List attachments of the current user uploaded.

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Filter attachments without group. This parameter will ignore group parameter.
parameters.name: ungrouped

post.description: Create attachment for the given post. Deprecated in favor of /attachments/-/upload.
Upload attachment to user center storage.

Upload attachment from the given URL.
Deprecated in favor of /attachments/-/upload.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

value.description: Value can be any JSON value

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

ownerName.description: Name of User who uploads the attachment

size.description: Size of attachment. Unit is Byte

permalink.description:
Permalink of attachment.
If it is in local storage, the public URL will be set.
If it is in s3 storage, the Object URL will be set.

Category.description: Category extension for grouping posts and building category archives.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the category.

hideFromList.description: Whether this category tree and its posts should be hidden from theme-side lists.

postTemplate.description: Theme template used to render posts associated with this category when the post does not specify its own template.

preventParentPostCascadeQuery.description: Whether ancestor category post queries should stop cascading into this category's children.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Larger values are ordered ahead by consumers that sort by priority.

template.description: Theme template used to render the category archive page.

CategorySpec.description: Desired display, hierarchy, and rendering configuration of a category.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the category permalink policy.

postCount.description: Total number of posts in this category and all descendant categories.

visiblePostCount.description: Total number of published and public posts in this category and all descendant categories.

lastTransitionTime.description: Last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.

message.description: Human-readable message indicating details about last transition. This may be an empty string.

reason.description: Unique, one-word, CamelCase reason for the condition's last transition.

status.description: Status is the status of the condition. Can be True, False, Unknown.

type.description: type of condition in CamelCase or in foo.example.com/CamelCase. example: Ready, Initialized. maxLength: 316.

Condition.description: EqualsAndHashCode 排除了lastTransitionTime否则失败时，lastTransitionTime 会被更新 导致 equals 为 false，一直被加入队列.

Contributor.description: User summary for a content owner or contributor.

from.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

autoGenerate.description: Whether Halo should generate the excerpt from the released content automatically.

raw.description: Manual excerpt text used when auto generation is disabled.

GroupKind.description: GroupKind contains group and kind data only.

categories.description: Resolved categories referenced by the post spec.

contributors.description: Users that have contributed to the post content snapshots.

tags.description: Resolved tags referenced by the post spec.

ListedPost.description: Post list item with resolved categories, tags, contributors, owner, and counters.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

generateName.description: The name field will be generated automatically according to the given generateName field

version.description: Current version of the Extension. It will be bumped up every update.

from.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

first.description: Indicates whether current page is the first page.

hasNext.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

hasPrevious.description: Indicates whether current page has previous page.

last.description: Indicates whether current page is the last page.

page.description: Page number, starts from 1. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

size.description: Size of each page. If not set or equal to 0, it means no pagination.

allowComment.description: Whether new comments are allowed for this post.

baseSnapshot.description: Base snapshot name used to apply snapshot patches.

categories.description: Category extension names associated with the post.

items.description: Category extension names associated with the post.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the post.

deleted.description: Whether the post is logically deleted and should be treated as recycled.

headSnapshot.description: Snapshot name of the latest draft content.

htmlMetas.description: HTML meta tag attribute maps injected into the post template head.

additionalProperties.description: HTML meta tag attribute maps injected into the post template head.

items.description: HTML meta tag attribute maps injected into the post template head.

pinned.description: Whether the post should be pinned ahead of normal post ordering.

priority.description: Sorting priority. Larger values are ordered ahead by consumers that sort by priority.

publish.description: Desired publish state. False keeps or moves the post to draft.

publishTime.description: Time when the post was published or is scheduled to be published.

releaseSnapshot.description: Snapshot name selected as the released version for theme-side rendering after publishing.

tags.description: Tag extension names associated with the post.

items.description: Tag extension names associated with the post.

template.description: Theme template used to render this post.

visible.description: Visibility of the post in theme-side queries. Only PUBLIC content is returned to anonymous visitors.

PostSpec.description: Desired content, publication, taxonomy, and rendering configuration of a post.

commentsCount.description: Total number of comments associated with the content item.

conditions.description: Latest reconciliation conditions for the content item.

contributors.description: Usernames that contributed to the content snapshots.

items.description: Usernames that contributed to the content snapshots.

excerpt.description: Excerpt text resolved from the content excerpt configuration.

hideFromList.description: Whether any associated category hides the content item from theme-side lists.

inProgress.description: Whether the latest draft snapshot differs from the released snapshot.

lastModifyTime.description: Last modification time of the released snapshot.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the content permalink policy.

phase.description: Current publishing phase of the content item, such as DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, PUBLISHED, or FAILED.

PostStatus.description: Observed state of a content item.

name.description: Extension name. This field is mandatory

Ref.description: Extension reference object. The name is mandatory

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.
A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

value.description: Value can be any JSON value

contentPatch.description: Rendered content for a base snapshot, or a JSON Patch from the base rendered content for a derived snapshot.

contributors.description: Usernames that contributed to this snapshot.

items.description: Usernames that contributed to this snapshot.

lastModifyTime.description: Last time the snapshot content was modified.

parentSnapshotName.description: Parent snapshot name in the snapshot revision chain.

rawPatch.description: Raw source content for a base snapshot, or a JSON Patch from the base raw content for a derived snapshot.

rawType.description: Type of the raw source content, such as markdown, html, json, asciidoc, or latex.

Snapshot.description: Snapshot extension that stores a version of post or single page content.

totalComment.description: Total comment count, including comments that may not be approved.

Stats.description: Aggregated visit, upvote, and comment counters for a content resource.

Tag.description: Tag extension for grouping posts by free-form labels.

color.description: Display color of the tag in 3- or 6-digit hex notation.

cover.description: Cover image URL or attachment URI of the tag.

TagSpec.description: Desired display and rendering configuration of a tag.

observedVersion.description: Metadata version observed by the last successful reconciliation.

permalink.description: Absolute permalink calculated from the tag permalink policy.

postCount.description: Total number of posts associated with the tag.

visiblePostCount.description: Total number of published and public posts associated with the tag.

path.description: A JSON Pointer path pointing to the location to move/copy from.

value.description: Value can be any JSON value

file.description: The file to upload. If not provided, the url will be used.

filename.description: The filename to use when uploading from url. If not provided, the filename will be extracted from the url.

url.description: The url to upload from. If not provided, the file will be used.

UploadForm.description: Upload form from console. The file and url are mutually exclusive. If both are provided, the file will be used.

providerUserId.description: The unique identifier for the user's connection to the OAuth provider. for example, the user's GitHub id.

registrationId.description: The name of the OAuth provider (e.g. Google, Facebook, Twitter).

updatedAt.description: The time when the user connection was last updated.

username.description: The {@link Metadata#getName Metadata#getName()} of the user associated with the OAuth connection.
